commands: prod: docker exec guvfx-postgres pg_dump | gzip > preE3_<ts>.sql.gz  (1.28 MB, gzip-verified)
prod: cd ~/guvfx-app && git checkout e69c144 ; rsync -a --delete --exclude .env backend/ ~/guvfx-prod/backend/
prod: docker compose run --rm guvfx-backend python manage.py migrate --plan  (additive-only safety gate)
prod: kill switch engaged + scheduler crons paused (window)
prod: docker compose run --rm guvfx-backend python manage.py migrate --no-input
prod: docker compose up -d --force-recreate --no-deps guvfx-backend guvfx-mt5-trade-ingest-worker
prod: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f deploy/shadow-worker/docker-compose.shadow-worker.yml up -d --force-recreate --no-deps guvfx-mt5-shadow-worker
prod: crontab restored + kill switch released (window closed)
expected_results: Production backend brought from cb2108c (#56) to current main e69c144 (#93) with all defaults left safe and E3 NOT enabled/armed.

9 additive migrations applied (trading 0008; execution 0009-0014; signal_intake 0007; strategies 0011); signal_intake 0003-0006 already applied by the listener are skipped; no destructive/data operation.
Backend + trade-ingest worker + shadow worker recreated on the new shared image; frontend/validate-worker (different images) and the wayond listener (separate image) untouched.
The live-trading path is protected during the rebuild by a kill-switch window (order creation blocked + scheduler crons paused + in-flight settled), restored afterwards.
Monitor-chain cron installed (proven safe at defaults). Existing shadow dry-run still passes on the new image. No Wayond ExecutionJob, no order_send, no notification transmitted.
Rollback path captured: prior image tagged rollback-preE3 + a verified pre-migration pg_dump.
actual_results: VERIFY 1 Backend healthy: guvfx-backend Up (recreated, new image 8a55b0cacf45); manage.py check = 0 issues; https://api.guvfx.com/api/auth/cookie/csrf/ = 200.

VERIFY 2 Workers healthy: guvfx-mt5-trade-ingest-worker (mt5-trade-ingest-1) + guvfx-mt5-shadow-worker (mt5-shadow-worker-1, MT5_SHADOW_WORKER=1) Up on new image; both connected to bridge http://100.79.101.19:8788; validate-worker (separate image) untouched.
VERIFY 3 Wayond listener healthy: guvfx-wayond-listener Up 33h (healthy); separate image, not rebuilt/restarted.

VERIFY 4 Monitor cron installed: '* * * * * ... run_monitor_chain >> /var/log/guvfx/monitor_chain.log # guvfx-monitor-chain'; smoke (--limit 0) = all zeros; real pass = close[processed=0 skipped=3] outcome[0] dispatch[enabled=False] failures=none.
VERIFY 5 Migrations applied: all 9 applied OK; showmigrations --plan unapplied count = 0.
VERIFY 6 Provider un-armed: wayond status=ONBOARDING; ARMED providers=[].
VERIFY 9 No AUTO_DEMO assignment active: count=0; auto_demo SignalSourceConfig rows=0.
VERIFY 10 Notification dispatch disabled: NOTIFICATION_DISPATCH_ENABLED unset -> OFF.
VERIFY 11 No new Wayond ExecutionJobs: total 50 (unchanged baseline); payload comment startswith 'WAY' count=0; TradeOutcomeRecords=0.
VERIFY 12 No order_send: 0 Wayond jobs; shadow dry-run reported order_send_called=false; kill switch was engaged during the window.
VERIFY 13 Shadow dry-run PASS: job #68 claimed by mt5-shadow-worker-1 -> bridge order_check retcode 0, order_send_called false, has_order_ids false; cleaned up; == VERIFICATION PASSED ==.

VERIFY 14 Rollback confirmed: guvfx-prod-guvfx-backend:rollback-preE3 (0449ad718a45) preserved; pg_dump preE3_20260706T215639Z.sql.gz (1.28 MB) gzip-verified, sha256 e4d25276...; crontab backup crontab.preE3_20260706T220151Z.bak.
Window closed cleanly: kill_switch_engaged=False (order_creation_kill_reason=None), 0 paused cron lines, 7 active manage.py crons (6 original + monitor), normal strategy trading resumed.
limitations: Production deploy — this is the only packet in the E3 arc that changes prod. It rebuilt the SHARED backend image and applied migrations to the LIVE DB; a kill-switch window (order-creation block + paused scheduler crons + in-flight settled) protected live strategy trading during the ~5-minute recreate, then normal trading was restored.

Nothing was armed or enabled: provider stays ONBOARDING, auto_execution_enabled False, signal_execution_mode SHADOW, no AUTO_DEMO assignment, dispatch OFF, transport dry-run. E3 remains RED behind Blueprint-06 ratification + recorded E3 sign-off + caps/node decision + arming (all Nuno-only, out of scope here).

Risk caps were NOT changed (per strict exclusion). The known ops gaps remain (single-VPS SPOFs, bridge SPOF, no automated recurring DB backup) — a one-off pre-migration pg_dump was taken for this deploy but recurring backup is a separate item.
The monitor chain's real pass skipped 3 pre-existing closed trades (fail-closed on open/incomplete data) and created zero outcome records — expected; no notification path is active.
The deployed worker script is bind-mounted from /srv/guvfx/worker_scripts and was already current (E2b shadow-only) — unchanged by this deploy; E3 did not modify the worker.
